011001111111010100000001 - ASI: 15

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0110 = 01 * 10
  0111 = 01 * 11
  1101 = 11 * 01
  011111 = 0111 * 11
  110101 = 1101 * 01
  00000001 = 0000 * 0001
  0110011111 = 0110 * 011111
  11010100000001 = 110101 * 00000001
  011001111111010100000001 = 0110011111 * 11010100000001
